entry.title: I watched you fall, and I did nothing.(He couldn't even call for help.)
entry.summary:
Author: Buddiecokkieta

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,710Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 2

Summary: After the team's private lives were laid bare—and after Buck, realizing he had hurt his family in a way he never could have foreseen, withdrew his lawsuit—what transpired at the grocery store, and everything that followed... Happy endings aren't really my thing—I mean, I think they'll get over this lawsuit business pretty quickly.

entry.title: the stranger that I once loved, the love I can´t leave
entry.summary:
Author: Potatozoo43lamas

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,146Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Buck and Eddie are two teen girl who first meet at 15 and 14 in Eddies hometown, wen Buck gets send away over the summer to spend some time with her uncle, pester Nash of the town. over the next years she comes back every summer until her last one at 18, tell in her best friend Eddie she can´t ever come back and they will never meat again. Over there next years they go different ways, one balding a life for herself the other barley living. (this summery sucks and I promises the actual story is hopefully better)

entry.title: Useful
entry.summary:
Author: KJ_Writing

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 880Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

entry.title: When The Line Blurs
entry.summary:
Author: Su2112

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,150Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: Some people have soulmates, though most never know it—unless they come close to death. In those moments, visions of a stranger’s life flicker at the edges of consciousness, binding two souls by something deeper than fate. Eddie Diaz learns this the hard way, stranded and bleeding in Afghanistan, haunted by glimpses of a young firefighter in Los Angeles. As he clings to life, their worlds collide in ways neither can explain. Soulmates aren’t always romantic, but sometimes, when the line between life and death blurs, they might become something more.Evan Buckley always craved knowing he was wanted. Plenty of movies and books promoted soulmates as an attainable finding of the other half of one's soul. Self-destructive as a teenager, Evan "Buck" Buckley believes his fate is to wander through life unwanted and unloved- until he meets Abby, who confesses she was drawn to him from the moment she saw him after a call. Could she be his soulmate? The only real way to know is a near-death experience. As he chokes on their first date, Buck has his answer- he does have a soulmate, but it's not the woman in front of him.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: LMR95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 176,733Chapters: 44/?Kudos: 105

Summary: He takes Buck's hand, like he has the right, and sees the evidence of Buck's devotion, a love letter written in blood, etched into every fingertip in a fit of desperation, and Eddie is overwhelmed with his love.The dam that broke as he fought for air no longer exists, and he doesn't know how to exist without shouting wordlessly about his love for Buck with every fiber of his being, with every word he says, every touch, every look, every breath.He knows he should be worried, he should try to hide it better, because he cannot risk it, cannot risk destroying what they have, but he is too tired, too woozy, too hurt.So he holds Buck’s hand, and looks into his eyes, that hold all the light of his existence. It feels like standing in the light of his personal sun, wrapped in its warmth.⸻⸻⸻ ₊⁺ ༻ ☼ ༺ ⁺₊ ⸻⸻⸻My rewrite from mid season 2 up to the shooting and its aftermath.

entry.title: I Will Follow You To Infinity And Beyond
entry.summary:
Author: A_rnie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,959Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 4

Summary: Eddie startled awake, the icy tendrils of his nightmare still clinging to him, and the shift beside him roused Buck from sleep. "What's wrong?" Buck's voice, thick with sleep, murmured. Buck felt Eddie's fear, a palpable shiver in the dark, and his arms instinctively tightened around him. "There is no place so far my love cannot reach you, Eddie Diaz. I will follow you to the doorstep of Eternity itself and never tire of the chase. You are my beginning and my ending. Do not be afraid, I will let nothing part us again. I would drain the Great Slipstream itself if it dared to claim you." Eddie planted a kiss on Buck's forehead, a profound gratitude blooming in his chest for his soulmate's unwavering presence. "Okay, Superman," Eddie chuckled softly. or;After Buck is separated from Eddie by a shotgun, he is reborn in a new world and creates a whole religion just to have Eddie reincarnate and be safe and happy again with him. He also does cool magic as a by-the-way. 😍😍

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: AL's Angel
entry.summary:
Author: Lounananana

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,304Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 93

Summary: Albert is back in L.A., and he’s just met an absolute angel of a firefighter—cute, gorgeous, kind, and hot. “An angel from the 105?” Chimney says. “Let me ask probie—he just pulled a shift over there.”  Meanwhile, Ravi can’t seem to shake a certain flirtatious playboy. No matter where he goes, it’s like the guy is haunting him.All he knows is that the guy's name is AL.

entry.title: Allies or Enemies
entry.summary:
Author: runechesters

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 102,486Chapters: 22/35Kudos: 98

Summary: Buck straightened up, looking Eddie up and down. “I’d still take you.” “You think?” “I know.” he said, puffing out his chest. They both laughed, and Buck looked down at his feet, before looking earnestly back up at Eddie. “Thank you,” he said quietly, “for having my back”. Eddie smiled despite himself. “I’ll see you in there, Buckley, and maybe you can have mine.” --- In which Evan Buckley is a District 5 power plant engineer and Eddie Diaz is a District 2 Career Academy trainee. It’s Eddie’s final chance to volunteer for the games. This was always the plan: get in, win, get out. Christopher is taken care of for a lifetime. He’s not looking to make any waves. In comes Evan “tsunami” Buckley to ruin all his plans. Welcome everyone to the 98th annual Hunger Games! Or The slow-burn enemies-to-friends-to-lovers Hunger Games AU buddie long-fic you’ve been waiting for!!

entry.title: but i’m tied tight (cut me loose)
entry.summary:
Author: hereforthevibess

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,049Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 26

Summary: Occasionally Eddie will wonder what even drew Shannon to him in the first place. And he tries hard not to bring it up, the last thing he wants was to reek of insecurity — especially after five years. But it rattled around in his mind from time to time, growing louder at times like these. When she was the life of the party. It meant all of Eddie’s friends were more Shannon’s friends, which — well, felt a little pathetic. If they ever broke up, it was a no-brainer who would win custody. It was obvious who would be left alone. Except Buck. No — Buck was all Eddie’s. — Or; Eddie tries to navigate the complexities of his two most important relationships in college —Buck and Shannon.

entry.title: Crawl Home to You
entry.summary:
Author: j_marie_archie50

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,908Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: Buck broke through the surface of the water, gasping for air and reaching for something to hold onto. He grasped onto the first thing he could find, which just happened to be the mirror on an abandoned fire engine. He choked on seawater, salt burning his throat and lungs. He felt like he was on fire. But that didn’t matter. “CHRIS!” he yelled, his voice breaking. “CHRISTOPHER!” Christopher mattered. Fuck. Buck hoisted himself onto the engine, desperately swiveling his head around. He cupped his hands around his mouth. “CHRISTOPHER!”   OR: Buck and Chris are on summer break from school. A day at the pier turns into a nightmare.

entry.title: OnlyBuck
entry.summary:
Author: Spacers24

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,102Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 330

Summary: (previously named CamBuck) When Buck finds himself low on fund after the lawsuit, his brilliant Idea to get more money is to open an onlyfans, keeping his identity a secret. Eddie stumbles upon his Onlyfans one night and discover Buck real identity next morning. Thus start Eddie Diaz quest to try and control himself around Buck, while the rest of the 118 is dragged along for the ride.

entry.title: Don't be homophobic Madison
entry.summary:
Author: pineapplehazard

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,465Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 657

Summary: Eddie : His posture was horrible!! And he WAS NOT on rythmBut because he managed to lift her twice without letting her fall that deserves 7s??? Maddie : WowWhat kind of monster did I create...?  Eddie :UghSee that's why I didn't want to watch this showIt's giving me flashbacks Maddie : Flashbacks?? 😳Flashbacks of what EXACTLY?? EDDIEEDMUNDOANSWER ME Eddie : I'll tell youBut Buck can't know about this ok?  Maddie : OMG a secret Buck doesn't know!!! 😵 Eddie : Don't make me regret it. Maddie :I'm not afraid of you 🔫Spill.  Eddie : I... I used to be a ballroom dancing champion?  Maddie : WHAAAAAAAAAAT🫵🤨 = 🕺? ________________ Eddie and Maddie finally start to interact just as Eddie is leaving for El Paso.Gossips, beef with Josh and matchmaking involved. (Canon until 8x13)

entry.title: Absolution: A Study of Eddie Diaz
entry.summary:
Author: Second_starr

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,725Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 35

Summary: It’s not sudden or shocking. Just there. Something inevitable Eddie kept trying to rename into safer shapes. Best friend. Partner. Family. Anything except the truth sitting underneath all of it. His chest caves inward sharply. Pepa’s expression changes immediately. “Hey,” she says. Eddie presses the heel of his hand against his mouth hard enough to hurt. His eyes are burning violently. Not now. Not here. Not after spending thirty-three years keeping this contained. “I tried so hard,” Eddie whispers. Pepa goes still. The words slip out before he can stop them. “I tried so hard to be right.” his voice breaks on the last word. And it finally destroys him. The exhaustion from spending his entire life trying to earn the right to exist comfortably inside himself. Tears spill before he can stop them. Eddie laughs once immediately afterward, humiliated on instinct. Or Eddie Begins Again

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Where Equipment Failure Leads
entry.summary:
Author: SociallyAwkwardWeirdo25

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,620Chapters: 3/9Kudos: 15

Summary: Buck knew B Shift had been rough on the gear, it was mentioned during hand over, but he hadn't expected only one working harness for a cliffside rescue. Or anything that came after the harness snapped and he fell to the water below. But how was he to expect a Pod of man-hating Mermaids or that they couldn't just let him leave?   What was that about a Moon Pool?

entry.title: meet me where i left you
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,238Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 780

Summary: Captain Buckley, who is steady, who has his shit together, who definitely does not recognize his new probie because he spent a night eight years ago with his hands in that man's hair whispering things against his skin that would get him fired on the spot if anyone in this building ever found out. "You must be Eddie Diaz." His hand goes out. Not shaking, by some miracle that deserves its own cathedral, its own patron saint, the patron saint of men who are dying inside and shaking hands about it. "Welcome to the 118. It’s nice to meet you, I’m Captain Buckley." Eddie takes his hand. A firm grip, calloused in places Buck doesn't remember, but Buck's skin recognizes him anyway, every nerve, all at once. "Captain." Eddie's voice is level, pleasant, perfectly neutral, and Buck would buy it completely if he couldn't see the tension bolted into Eddie's shoulders. "Thanks for having me." A beat. "You got a first name, Captain Buckley?" "Evan. But most people just call me Buck." "Buck," Eddie repeats, tasting it, dragging it out, and Buck's stomach drops through the floor. "Suits you." Or,Captain Buckley WILL NOT fuck his new probie, okay? At least, not again.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Forgetting something?
entry.summary:
Author: Fictionfan321

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,493Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 108

Summary: Buck has a feeling he's forgetting something. He just can't put his finger on what. Until he receives an angry phone call Also don't hate me for this but chris is younger then in canon. Theo is 4 and chris is 9. I wanted them a bit closer in age and young enough to ask what certain words mean that older kids will understand. It might make sense in this story.

entry.title: And I'm damned if I do, and I'm damned if I don't
entry.summary:
Author: Calicomarie11

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,356Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 154

Summary: Eddie wasn’t sure how he had found himself agreeing to tag along with his cousin Rafael to the Hotshots set on one of his few vacation days that were left. Rafa convinced him that even though he didn’t have an agent (or any desire to have one) and he hadn’t been hired for the gig, if he just showed up, they would let him on set. And the bastard had been right. They rolled up to the gate and went through with Rafa’s work pass, and then he was dragged before the Assistant Director, who looked him up and down, and then made a slower pass before nodding thoughtfully. “You look like you were meant to run into burning buildings. Have you ever done this before?” “Not as such, ma’am. I served two tours as an Army Medic.” “So respectful,” she said, patting his cheek, “Heather, get him set up with paperwork and then take him to Rochelle for a costume. We’re going to make a firefighter out of you today.” -------When Eddie tags along with his cousin to a TV set he finds more than an authentic LA experience.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Second Chances
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,009,682Chapters: 99/?Kudos: 131

Summary: Bobby and Athena are just two people trying to put their lives back together while figuring out how to co-parent. What starts as a complicated plan to foster kids in need slowly turns into something much deeper. Through the ups and downs of heartbreak, healing, and raising children who’ve been through so much, they find strength in each other. Over time, their partnership grows into love, and together, they build a story about family, trust, and second chances.
